articles.author: John Doe
articles.title: JavaScript: New ES2026 Features Announced
articles.description: The TC39 committee has officially approved several new features for ES2026.
articles.content: The TC39 committee has officially approved several new features for ES2026, including pattern matching and records/tuples.

articles.author: Jane Smith
articles.title: Node.js 24 Released with Native TypeScript Support
articles.description: Node.js 24 ships with built-in TypeScript support.
articles.content: Node.js 24 ships with built-in TypeScript support, eliminating the need for ts-node.
